item.title: Mark Gurman：苹果 Vision Pro 团队已被拆分重组
item.guid: Mark-Gurman：苹果-Vision-Pro-团队已被拆分重组
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple has significantly adjusted the strategic priorities of its closed-loop headset project, with the original Vision product team being split and reorganized, and the business focus fully shifting to AR glasses and other AI wearable devices. 据彭博社报道，苹果已大幅调整封闭式头显项目的战略优先级，原 Vision 产品团队被分拆重组，业务重心全面转向 AR 眼镜与其他 AI 可穿戴设备。

Reporter Mark Gurman, citing sources, revealed that Apple had disbanded its original Vision Product Group (VPG) a year ago, splitting its software and hardware personnel and integrating them into the company's larger engineering structure. 记者 Mark Gurman 援引知情人士透露，苹果在一年前已解散原 Vision 产品团队（VPG），将其软硬件人员拆分并入公司更庞大的工程架构中。

Currently, Mike Rockwell, the former head of VPG, has transitioned to oversee the joint software division for Siri and visionOS, with most of his and his core deputies' energy now focused on the research and development of Siri's business. 目前，原 VPG 负责人 Mike Rockwell 转为统管 Siri 与 visionOS 的联合软件部门，且其本人及核心副手的大部分精力均已倾斜至 Siri 业务的研发。

In terms of product development, Apple has paused the advancement of major closed-system new headsets, and the low-cost headset codenamed N100 (Vision Air) was also canceled last year. 产品开发方面，苹果暂缓了重大封闭式新头显的推进，代号为 N100 的低成本头显（Vision Air）亦已于去年被取消。

On the software front, Gurman states that the upcoming visionOS 27 will lack significant feature-level innovations, with updates focusing solely on underlying performance optimization, bug fixes, and feature alignment with systems like iOS 27 in new AI editing tools and Siri upgrades. 软件层面，Gurman 称即将发布的 visionOS 27 将缺乏重大功能级创新，更新重点仅限于底层性能优化、Bug 修复，以及实现与 iOS 27 等系统在全新 AI 编辑工具和 Siri 升级上的功能对齐。

The report points out that during the pause in closed-system headset development, the relevant hardware teams are concentrating resources on tackling new AI wearable devices such as "AirPods with cameras" and "AI pendants." 报道指出，在暂停封闭式头显推进期间，相关硬件团队正集中资源攻坚「带摄像头的 AirPods」及「AI 吊坠」等新型 AI 可穿戴设备。

🔗 Related Reading: Next month's Apple WWDC, what if iCloud became iClaw...? 🔗 相关阅读： 下个月的苹果 WWDC，假如 iCloud 变成 iClaw……?

item.title: 微信状态要推出「访客记录」了
item.guid: 微信状态要推出「访客记录」了
item.description:
WeChat recently began gray-scale testing a "Personal Status" visitor record feature on its iOS client, allowing users to view the number of people who have viewed their posted status and, under specific conditions, display the avatars of viewers. 微信近期在 iOS 客户端灰度测试「个人状态」访客记录功能，允许用户查看自己发布状态的浏览人数，并在特定条件下显示浏览者头像。

According to a leak from Xiaohongshu blogger "C" (Yang_Ccn), this feature is currently in internal testing and is open to active status users. The leak states that the number of viewers will be displayed in the bottom right corner of the status page, and this number is likely to count unique viewers rather than total views. 据小红书博主「C」（Yang_Ccn）的爆料，该功能目前处于内测阶段，面向状态活跃用户开放。爆料称，状态页右下角将显示浏览人数，该数字大概率统计的是独立浏览用户数，而非浏览次数。

The avatars that appear after clicking are limited to users who "have viewed your status and currently also have a status set" — if the other party viewed your status but has not posted a status themselves, their avatar will not appear in the list. 点击后出现的头像，则限于「浏览了你的状态，且自身当前也设置了状态」的用户 —— 若对方浏览了你的状态但自己没有发布状态，其头像不会出现在列表中。

Additionally, other bloggers have supplemented: 另有博主补充表示：

  • Previously viewed statuses of others won't show, but if you post a status later, they will appear in the list (the appearance of bubbles doesn't seem strongly tied to chronological order); 之前刷过别人的状态不显示，但后面自己发状态了也会显示在列表（气泡出现似乎没有和时间顺序强挂钩）；
  • Clicking on a bubble avatar allows you to directly view the corresponding friend's status; 点击气泡头像可以直接查看对应好友的状态；
  • Friends who haven't been gray-scaled but have viewed a status will also appear in the visitor list of gray-scaled friends. 未被灰度的朋友看过状态也会显示在被灰度朋友的访客列表内。

Tencent Customer Service's official account subsequently responded to this feature, stating that within the status's validity period, users can view the number of people who have viewed that status in the bottom right corner; if a viewer currently also has a status set, their avatar will be visible, and tapping it will allow viewing the other party's status. 腾讯客服官方账号随后就此功能作出回应，表示在状态有效期内，用户可在右下角查看该条状态的浏览人数；若浏览者当前也设置了状态，则可看到其头像，轻点即可查看对方状态。

The official statement also confirmed that this feature is currently undergoing gray-scale testing on the iOS client and has not yet been fully rolled out. Users who do not see the relevant entry are advised to wait patiently. 官方同时确认，该功能目前正在 iOS 客户端进行灰度测试，尚未全量推送，建议未见到相关入口的用户耐心等待。

item.title: 曝 AMD 下代 CPU 将使用三星 2nm 打造
item.guid: 曝-AMD-下代-CPU-将使用三星-2nm-打造
item.description:
Leaker Jukan yesterday cited news from Daishin Securities, stating that Samsung may have won a new 2nm laptop CPU order from a "North American fabless customer." Jukan subsequently speculated that the customer "appears to be AMD." 爆料人 Jukan 昨日援引大信证券消息称，三星可能已赢得一笔来自「北美无晶圆厂客户」的 2 纳米笔记本电脑 CPU 新订单。Jukan 随后推测该客户「看来像是 AMD」。

Furthermore, according to analysis by wccftech, with TSMC's advanced process capacity fully booked until 2028 and tech companies like Nvidia and Apple actively occupying capacity, Samsung is considered the best alternative for AMD to achieve sufficient production before the planned release dates of its Venice and Verano CPUs. 另据 wccftech 的分析，由于台积电先进制程产能已排满至 2028 年，在英伟达、苹果等科技公司积极占据产能的背景下，三星被认为是 AMD 在 Venice 和 Verano CPU 计划发布时间节点前实现足够产量的最佳替代方案。

Additionally, AMD may also hope to prioritize obtaining DRAM memory produced by Samsung through this cooperation agreement. 此外，AMD 或也希望借此合作协议优先获取三星生产的 DRAM 内存。

Samsung currently still faces yield issues, with a gap between its current state and customer expectations. Qualcomm and Tesla were previously reported to be evaluating shifting 2nm orders to Samsung, but there has been no official confirmation of progress. If AMD ultimately adopts Samsung's 2nm solution, it would be a significant customer endorsement for Samsung's advanced process business this year. 三星目前仍面临良率问题，与客户期望标准之间存在差距。高通及特斯拉此前也被报道正在评估将 2 纳米订单转向三星，但尚无官方确认进展。若 AMD 最终采用三星 2 纳米方案，将是三星先进制程业务在今年获得的重要客户背书。

item.title: 总量承压、结构分化：4 月燃油车零售同比跌 37%，新能源渗透率创新高
item.guid: 总量承压、结构分化：4-月燃油车零售同比跌-37%，新能源渗透率创新高
item.description:
The China Passenger Car Association (CPCA) yesterday released its "National Passenger Car Market Analysis Report for April 2026." Data shows that in April, national passenger car retail sales were 1.384 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 21.5% and a month-on-month decrease of 16.0%; cumulative retail sales from January to April this year were 5.604 million units, a year-on-year decrease of 18.5%. 乘联分会昨日发布《2026 年 4 月份全国乘用车市场分析》报告。数据显示，4 月全国乘用车市场零售 138.4 万辆，同比下降 21.5%，环比下降 16.0%；今年 1—4 月累计零售 560.4 万辆，同比下降 18.5%。

In terms of new energy, wholesale sales of new energy passenger vehicles reached 1.225 million units in April, a year-on-year increase of 7.5% and a month-on-month increase of 7.0%; retail sales were 849,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 6.8% and a month-on-month decrease of 0.3%. 新能源方面，4 月新能源乘用车批发销量达 122.5 万辆，同比增长 7.5%，环比增长 7.0%；零售量为 84.9 万辆，同比下降 6.8%，环比下降 0.3%。

The penetration rate of new energy vehicles in the domestic passenger car retail market rose to 61.4%, an increase of 9.7 percentage points compared to the same period last year. Among them, the penetration rate of new energy vehicles for independent brands reached 80.1%, while mainstream joint venture brands rose to 14.1%. 新能源车在国内乘用车零售市场的渗透率升至 61.4%，较去年同期增长 9.7 个百分点。其中，自主品牌新能源渗透率达 80.1%，主流合资品牌升至 14.1%。

In terms of domestic new energy passenger vehicle retail sales, BYD ranked first with 182,025 units, Geely Auto came in second with 95,585 units, and Changan Auto was third with 64,471 units. Leapmotor entered the top four with 57,162 units, Xiaomi Auto delivered 36,702 units, and Tesla China's domestic retail sales were 25,956 units. 国内新能源乘用车零售方面，比亚迪以 182025 辆居首，吉利汽车 95585 辆排名第二，长安汽车 64471 辆位列第三。零跑汽车以 57162 辆进入前四，小米汽车交付 36702 辆，特斯拉中国国内零售为 25956 辆。

The fuel vehicle market continues to face pressure. In April, wholesale sales of conventional fuel passenger vehicles were 890,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 16% and a month-on-month decrease of 28%; retail sales were 530,000 units, a year-on-year decrease of 37% and a month-on-month decrease of 33%. 燃油车市场持续承压。4 月常规燃油乘用车批发销量 89 万辆，同比下降 16%，环比下降 28%；零售量 53 万辆，同比下降 37%，环比下降 33%。

item.title: 开发者让 Codex 自己去赚钱，22 小时赚回 16 刀遭群嘲
item.guid: 开发者让-Codex-自己去赚钱，22-小时赚回-16-刀遭群嘲
item.description:
Yesterday, developer Chris shared on X his experience of letting Codex earn money by itself: he directly asked it to 'earn $5', and Codex then ran autonomously for about 22 hours, ultimately earning back $16.88. 昨天，开发者 Chris 在 X 分享了自己让 Codex 自己去赚钱的经历：他直接要求其「去赚 5 美元」，Codex 随后全程自主运行约 22 小时，最终赚回 16.88 美元。

According to reports, Codex autonomously completed the entire process of finding security vulnerabilities in open-source projects, submitting PRs, communicating with project maintainers, handling GitHub verification processes, and finally receiving payment. Chris stated that this was his first personal experience with AI autonomous revenue generation, and it corroborates Sam Altman's vision of 'AI earning money for people' becoming a reality. 据介绍，Codex 自主完成了寻找开源项目安全漏洞、提交 PR、与项目维护者沟通、处理 GitHub 验证流程直至收款的全套流程。Chris 表示，这是他亲历 AI 自主创收的第一次实验，并以此佐证 Sam Altman 所描绘的「AI 替人赚钱」愿景正在成为现实。

However, this result sparked widespread ridicule in the developer community. Several developers pointed out that the computing power cost of running a top-tier AI agent continuously for 22 hours is extremely high, with some even stating that it's equivalent to spending $2,000 to get less than $17 in revenue, calling it 'paying to work'. 然而，这一结果引发开发者社区的大规模嘲讽。多名开发者指出，让顶配 AI 智能体持续运转 22 小时所消耗的算力成本极高，有人甚至表示其相当于花 2000 美元换回不到 17 美元的收益，堪称「倒贴打工」。

Chris responded that he did not directly bear the computing costs but used a $20 monthly subscription package, shifting the cost to the platform. However, he also admitted that Codex was restricted twice by system risk control due to abnormal behavior during task execution, and its account was flagged. Chris 回应称，他并未直接承担算力费用，而是使用了 20 美元的包月订阅套餐，将成本转移至平台侧。不过他也承认，Codex 在执行任务期间因异常行为被系统风控限制了两次，账号曾遭到标记。

He stated that the current inference cost for calling GPT-5.5 is still high (approximately $30 per million output tokens), and the platform is operating at a loss; however, he expects the cost to drop to about $2 next year, at which point this fully automated order-taking model will be commercially viable for both users and the platform. 他表示，目前调用 GPT-5.5 的推理成本仍然高昂（百万输出 Token 约 30 美元），平台处于亏损状态；但他预计明年成本将降至约 2 美元，届时这种全自动接单模式将对用户和平台均具备商业可行性。

item.title: 曝快手计划分拆可灵 AI，200 亿美元估值融资 20 亿美元，腾讯参与洽谈
item.guid: 曝快手计划分拆可灵-AI，200-亿美元估值融资-20-亿美元，腾讯参与洽谈
item.description:
According to LatePost, Kuaishou plans to spin off its video generation large model business, Keling AI, seeking financing at a valuation of $20 billion, with a target financing size of $2 billion. Discussions are currently underway with investors such as Tencent. If this financing is completed, Keling will become the highest-valued independent video generation large model product globally. 据晚点 LatePost 报道，快手计划分拆旗下视频生成大模型业务可灵 AI，以 200 亿美元估值寻求融资，目标融资规模为 20 亿美元，目前正与腾讯等投资方商谈。若此次融资完成，可灵将成为目前全球估值最高的视频生成大模型独立产品。

The report disclosed that Keling's current annualized recurring revenue (ARR) has reached $500 million, doubling since before the Chinese New Year this year. Earlier this year, Kuaishou set an annual revenue target of $60 million for Keling, which actually achieved $150 million by the end of last year. The current $500 million ARR has exceeded Kuaishou's most optimistic expectations. 报道披露，可灵当前年化收入（ARR）已达 5 亿美元，较今年春节前翻倍。今年初，快手为可灵设定的全年收入目标为 6000 万美元，去年底实际完成 1.5 亿美元，目前 5 亿美元的 ARR 已超出快手最乐观的预期。

item.title: PS3 模拟器 RPCS3 发新规禁止纯 Agent 代码：开发者需对代码完全负责
item.guid: PS3-模拟器-RPCS3-发新规禁止纯-Agent-代码：开发者需对代码完全负责
item.description:
Yesterday, the official PS3 open-source emulator RPCS3 announced on X that it prohibits 'autonomous' AI agents from participating in code contributions and requires developers submitting PRs to fully understand and truly own all the code they submit. 昨天，PS3 开源模拟器 RPCS3 官方在 X 发文表示，禁止「自主」AI Agent 参与代码贡献，并要求提交 PR 的开发者必须完全理解、真正拥有自己提交的所有代码。

The team pointed out that such code not only wastes review time, but some changes have even been merged into the main branch, causing features to fail for all users. 团队指出，此类代码不仅浪费审查时间，部分改动甚至已被合并进主分支，导致功能对所有用户失效。

According to the full text of the rules published by RPCS3, the project allows the use of AI for research and reverse engineering, but contributors must take full responsibility for their submissions. The rules also stipulate that all project code, comments, and GitHub comments must be submitted by humans, not AI agents. 根据 RPCS3 公布的规则全文，项目允许使用 AI 辅助研究和逆向功能，但贡献者须对提交内容负完全责任。规则同时规定，项目所有代码、注释及 GitHub 评论均须由人类提交，而非 AI 智能体。

If a PR uses an AI agent or automated tool, the contributor must disclose the extent of AI involvement in the description, specifying which code was generated by AI and what kind of human review it underwent before submission; failure to disclose may result in the PR being closed directly without review. Users who repeatedly submit untested, unverified AI-generated code will be banned from the project. 若 PR 使用了 AI 智能体或自动化工具，贡献者必须在描述中披露 AI 参与范围，注明哪些代码由 AI 生成，以及提交前经过了何种人工审查；未披露者，PR 可能在未经审核的情况下直接关闭。对于屡次提交未经测试、验证的 AI 生成代码的用户，项目将予以封禁。

item.title: 软银宣布量产大规模电池，目标年产 1GWh 供 AI 数据中心使用
item.guid: 软银宣布量产大规模电池，目标年产-1GWh-供-AI-数据中心使用
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, SoftBank Group's mobile business subsidiary announced yesterday that it plans to start mass production of battery cells at its factory in Sakai, Osaka, to meet the continuously growing power demand driven by AI services. 据彭博社报道，软银集团旗下移动业务子公司昨日宣布，计划在其位于大阪堺市的工厂启动大规模电池单体量产，以应对 AI 服务带来的持续增长的电力需求。

SoftBank will collaborate with South Korea's Cosmos Lab and DeltaX Co., planning to achieve mass production starting from the fiscal year beginning next April, with a target annual capacity of 1 gigawatt-hour (GWh) for energy storage systems. This will make it one of Japan's largest battery production facilities, with potential to expand capacity to several gigawatt-hours in the future. 软银将与韩国 Cosmos Lab 及 DeltaX Co. 展开合作，计划从明年 4 月开始的财年起实现量产，目标年产能为 1 吉瓦时（GWh）的储能系统，这将使其成为日本规模最大的电池生产设施之一，未来有望将产能扩大至数吉瓦时。

In terms of cooperation and division of labor, Cosmos Lab is responsible for developing safer battery cells using its zinc-halogen technology, while DeltaX Co. possesses expertise in high energy density design. 在合作分工上，Cosmos Lab 负责利用其锌卤素技术开发更安全的电池单体，DeltaX Co. 则在高能量密度设计方面具备专业能力。

SoftBank stated that these batteries will first be used in its own AI data centers currently under construction, and it also plans to supply them to scenarios such as power grids, factories, and industrial and residential sectors. In the medium to long term, SoftBank will also seek to expand into overseas markets. 软银表示，这批电池将首先用于其自身正在建设的 AI 数据中心，同时也计划向电网、工厂及工业和住宅等场景供应。中长期来看，软银还将寻求拓展海外市场。

item.title: 黄仁勋致 2026 届毕业生：AI 不会取代你，但更会用 AI 的人可能会
item.guid: 黄仁勋致-2026-届毕业生：AI-不会取代你，但更会用-AI-的人可能会
item.description:
Yesterday, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang attended Carnegie Mellon University (CMU)'s 2026 commencement ceremony and received an honorary doctorate in science and technology. 昨天，英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋出席 Carnegie Mellon University（CMU）2026 年毕业典礼，并接受科学与技术荣誉博士学位。

Jensen Huang directly responded to the widespread job anxiety. He stated that AI is ending the 60-year-old traditional computing paradigm — shifting from humans writing code to machine learning, from CPUs to GPUs, and from executing instructions to understanding, reasoning, and planning. 黄仁勋对当前弥漫的就业焦虑给出了直接回应。他表示，AI 正在终结延续 60 年的传统计算范式 —— 从人类编写代码转向机器学习，从 CPU 转向 GPU，从执行指令转向理解、推理与规划。

He believes this shift levels the playing field for old experiences, putting everyone back on the same starting line . He specifically pointed out, "AI is unlikely to replace you, but a person who uses AI more effectively might." 他认为，这一转变让旧有经验的优势被削平，所有人重新站上同一条起跑线 。他特别指出，「AI 不太可能取代你，但更会使用 AI 的人可能会取代你」。

For young people who have just received their diplomas and have no baggage, this is actually a good thing. Because everyone no longer needs to stubbornly stick to old tracks already filled by predecessors, but instead, stands on the same starting line with everyone else, once again.

He also called on scientists, engineers, and policymakers to jointly take responsibility, establishing safety guardrails while advancing AI capabilities, and ensuring that the benefits of AI can reach a wider population. He also mentioned that the large-scale construction required to support AI infrastructure will bring new opportunities for traditional industry workers such as electricians, construction workers, and steelworkers. 他同时呼吁科学家、工程师与政策制定者共同承担责任，在推进 AI 能力的同时建立安全护栏，并确保 AI 的红利能够惠及更广泛的人群。他还提到，支撑 AI 基础设施所需的大规模建设将为电工、建筑工人、钢铁工人等传统行业从业者带来新的机遇。

Notably, at the ceremony, Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger personally draped an honorary doctorate stole over Jensen Huang, and after the ceremony, publicly revealed that the two companies are collaborating on "exciting new products," but did not disclose further details. 值得注意的是，典礼上，Intel CEO 陈立武亲手为黄仁勋披上荣誉博士披肩，并在典礼结束后公开透露，两家公司正在合作开发「令人期待的新产品」，但未披露更多细节。

🔗 Related Reading: Jensen Huang to the Class of 2026: Don't Panic, AI Puts Everyone Back on the Same Starting Line | Full Speech Attached 🔗 相关阅读： 黄仁勋致 2026 届毕业生：别慌，AI 把所有人拉回同一起跑线 | 附演讲全文

item.title: 360 向全体员工发放 1 亿 Token
item.guid: 360-向全体员工发放-1-亿-Token
item.description:
According to Cover News, 360 recently issued an all-staff letter, announcing the distribution of 100 million tokens to each employee for use on the company's "360 Security Lobster" AI agent platform. 据封面新闻报道，360 近日发布全员信，宣布向全体员工每人发放 1 亿 Token，用于使用公司旗下「360安全龙虾」AI 智能体平台。

Company insiders stated that they hope to promote employees from "using AI tools" to "working with an AI team" by providing "an AI expert team for everyone," thereby achieving their goal of "everyone is a super individual." 公司内部人士表示，希望通过「人手一支 AI 专家团」的方式，推动员工从「使用 AI 工具」升级为「带着 AI 团队工作」，实现其所称的「人人都是超级个体」目标。

item.title: 小米新一代智能座舱入网
item.guid: 小米新一代智能座舱入网
item.description:
According to blogger "Digital Chat Station," Xiaomi's new generation intelligent cockpit has been connected to the network. It also emphasized, "Guess if it's the legendary Kunlun." 据博主「数码闲聊站」消息，小米新一代智能座舱入网。同时其还强调「猜猜是不是传说中的昆仑」。

It is reported that a device with model number 26109VP30C from Xiaomi Communications Technology Co., Ltd. passed the radio approval of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology on April 24. 据悉，小米通讯技术有限公司一款型号为 26109VP30C 的设备于 4 月 24 日通过工信部无线电核准。

Furthermore, according to an analysis report by Sina Technology, the device received another certificate on April 30, clearly identifying its name as "Vehicle Wireless Terminal," supporting 5G-enhanced Mobile Broadband (eMBB) technology, and also supporting dual-SIM dual-standby mode. 另据新浪科技分析报道，该设备在 4 月 30 日又获发证书，明确设备名称为「车载无线终端」，支持 5G-增强移动宽带（eMBB）技术，还支持双卡双待机模式。

According to previous reports, Xiaomi Auto's first extended-range SUV, internally codenamed "Kunlun N3," is expected to belong to a new independent sub-brand "Xuntian." Meanwhile, spy photos of the corresponding model have been exposed multiple times. It is reported that this model will offer a retractable roof, which is expected to be used as an RV when raised. 据此前报道，小米汽车首款增程式 SUV 内部代号为「昆仑 N3」，有望归属于全新的独立子品牌「寻天」。同时，相应车型谍照此前已经多次曝光。据悉，这款车型将提供可升降车顶，车顶升起后预计可作为房车使用。

item.title: MiniMax 启动「10x Team」计划，向工业软件、芯片设计等领域招募行业专家
item.guid: MiniMax-启动「10x-Team」计划，向工业软件、芯片设计等领域招募行业专家
item.description:
MiniMax yesterday released a recruitment announcement, declaring the launch of its "10x Team" collaboration program, seeking industry experts across multiple vertical domains to jointly participate in large model construction. MiniMax 昨日发布招募公告，宣布启动「10x Team」合作计划，面向多个垂直领域寻找行业专家，共同参与大模型构建。

Collaborators recruited for this program need to possess industry experience, agree with the direction of AI accelerating industry progress, and be willing to participate in problem definition, evaluation construction, and workflow development. MiniMax stated that relevant evaluations will be open-sourced, and collaboration results will have the opportunity to influence industry development trends. 此次招募的合作者需具备行业积累，认同 AI 加速行业进程的方向，并愿意参与定义问题、构建评测与工作流。MiniMax 表示，相关评测将对外开源，合作成果有机会影响行业发展走向。

Regarding cooperation formats, MiniMax offers two options: full-time employment and Fellowship. 在合作形式上，MiniMax 提供全职加入与 Fellowship 两种选项。

The Fellowship program requires an offline collaboration period of no less than four months, with work locations selectable from Shanghai, Beijing, Hong Kong, San Francisco, or London. MiniMax also supports co-authorship and academic achievement sharing, and stated that it will offer internationally competitive salaries, with Fellowship participants also eligible for stock incentives. Fellowship 项目要求线下协作周期不少于四个月，工作地点可选择上海、北京、中国香港、旧金山或伦敦。MiniMax 同时支持联合署名与学术成果共享，并表示将提供具国际竞争力的薪酬，Fellowship 参与者亦可获得股票激励。

item.title: Vbot 维他动力完成近 5 亿元 Pre-A 轮融资
item.guid: Vbot-维他动力完成近-5-亿元-Pre-A-轮融资
item.description: According to IPO Zaozhidao, Vbot Vita Power recently completed a Pre-A round of financing of nearly 500 million yuan, co-led by Oriental Fortune Capital, Huatai Zijin, and Fosun RZ Capital, with participation from SAIC Group's Shangqi Capital and Minghui Zhiyuan. Existing shareholders such as Hillhouse Capital and BV Baidu Ventures continued to follow suit. 据《IPO早知道》消息，Vbot 维他动力近日完成近 5 亿元 Pre-A 轮融资，由东方嘉富、华泰紫金、复星锐正联合领投，上汽集团旗下尚颀资本、明荟致远参与投资，高瓴创投、BV 百度风投等老股东继续跟投。

item.title: 💡 姚顺宇：Scaling Law 没有到头，大多数「撞墙」是因为有 bug
item.guid: 💡-姚顺宇：Scaling-Law-没有到头，大多数「撞墙」是因为有-bug
item.description:
In the latest episode of "Zhang Xiaojun's Business Interview Series" released yesterday, Google DeepMind researcher Yao Shunyu stated that the scaling law for pre-training has not reached its limit. When asked if the pace of model progress was slowing down, his answer was "not at all." 在昨天发布的最新一期《张小珺商业访谈录》中，Google DeepMind 研究员姚顺宇表示，预训练的 Scaling Law 并没有到头。在被问及模型进步速度是否放缓时，他的回答是「完全没有」。

He explained that using the increase in Benchmark scores to judge the speed of progress is itself a misleading framework — any Benchmark has an upper limit, and the closer it gets to a perfect score, the slower the numerical growth naturally becomes. 他解释称，用 Benchmark 分数涨幅来判断进展快慢，本身就是一个误导性框架 —— 任何 Benchmark 都有上限，越接近满分，数字增长自然越慢。

The model's ability to "learn things" is continuously strengthening, and researchers are now focusing more on "clearly defining problems and constructing appropriate data," while the rest "often seems to happen naturally."

For those who believe that the Scaling Law has hit its ceiling, he summarized three sources: the inherent limits of the law's applicability, and the exhaustion of critical conditions (such as data). 对于那些认为 Scaling Law 已触及天花板的观点，他归纳出三种来源：规律本身的适用范围有极限、关键条件（如数据）已耗尽。

He believes that most "hitting a wall" situations are actually due to bugs in the research work itself that researchers haven't discovered. "The progress brought by fixing a bug is far greater than some very magical techniques." 他认为大多数「撞墙」，其实是研究工作本身存在 bug，但研究者自己没有发现。「修好一个 bug 带来的进展，远大于一些很神奇的技巧。」

When talking about his biggest expectation for this year, he used a slogan he often says: 而在谈及今年最大的期待，他用了一个自己常说的口号：

Train with finite context, use as infinite context.

The ability to train with finite context but support nearly infinite context during inference is expected to be realized this year, he predicts. Once implemented, this will unlock a truly continuous personal assistant – a model that dynamically manages memory during long-term interaction with users, no longer limited by a fixed context window. 用有限的上下文训练、却能在推理时支持近乎无限上下文的能力，他预计今年有望实现。一旦落地，这将解锁真正意义上的持续性个人助手 —— 模型在与用户长期交互中动态管理记忆，而不再受限于固定的上下文窗口。

item.title: 5499 元起，大疆发布 ROMO 2 系列扫拖机器人
item.guid: 5499-元起，大疆发布-ROMO-2-系列扫拖机器人
item.description:
Yesterday, DJI officially released the DJI ROMO 2 series of sweeping and mopping robots, including the ROMO P2 and ROMO A2 models. They feature a new generation AI perception system and a radar-adaptive ultra-wide swing robotic arm, targeting the high-end smart cleaning market. First, let's look at the prices: 昨日，大疆正式发布 DJI ROMO 2 系列扫拖机器人，包含 ROMO P2 和 ROMO A2 两款，搭载新一代 AI 感知系统与雷达自适应超幅外摆机械臂，定位高端智能清洁市场。先看价格：

ROMO P2 water tank version is 5999 yuan, and the automatic water supply/drainage ultra-thin base station version is 6499 yuan; ROMO A2 water tank version is 5499 yuan, and the automatic water supply/drainage ultra-thin base station version is 5999 yuan.

The core upgrades of the ROMO 2 series focus on three areas: perception, cleaning, and maintenance. ROMO 2 系列的核心升级集中在感知、清洁与维护三条线。

    Perception-wise, the obstacle avoidance system is derived from DJI's flagship drone technology, using a combination of array speckle projection lidar and dual fisheye vision sensors. It can identify and avoid cables with a diameter of 2 mm, and also effectively recognize transparent obstacles such as glass and mirrors;

    The robotic arm swings up to 123°, covering an additional 4.5 cm of corner area per swing compared to the previous generation. The overall suction power is rated at 36000Pa, and the dual-layer continuous obstacle crossing height is increased to 8.5 cm;

    In terms of cleaning strategy, the AI system can automatically boost pressure when recognizing carpets, deploy the robotic arm for precise cleaning after detecting liquid stains, and supports modes such as intelligent re-mopping and automatic mop lifting, eliminating the need for users to pre-tidy the room;

    Regarding the base station, the ROMO 2 series introduces a high-temperature self-cleaning solution, where four high-pressure water jets, combined with disinfectant cleaning fluid, soak the mop. The air path includes high-temperature drying, UV lamps, and multiple filtration, which the official claims can achieve "year-round maintenance-free" operation;

    The dust collection process uses 32 types of acoustic noise reduction materials, with official claims of filtering 85% of dust collection noise. The DJI Home app simultaneously adds a dirt heatmap, supports one-stop path editing within the map, and the robot is equipped with 55W fast charging, replenishing power during each return to the station for cleaning.

item.title: 红魔 11S Pro 外观曝光
item.guid: 红魔-11S-Pro-外观曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, Red Magic officially unveiled the exterior design of its new generation gaming flagship, the Red Magic 11S Pro, and announced that the device is scheduled for official release on May 18th. 昨天，红魔正式公布了新一代电竞旗舰红魔 11S Pro 的外观设计，并宣布该机定档 5 月 18 日正式发布。

The Red Magic 11S Pro features a true full-screen design on the front, utilizing an under-display camera solution, eliminating punch-holes and notches, making it this year's first "true full-screen" flagship smartphone. 红魔 11S Pro 正面采用真全面屏方案，采用屏下摄像头方案，取消了挖孔与刘海设计，成为今年首款「真全面屏」旗舰手机。

    Debuts with Qualcomm's fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Extreme "Leading Edition" processor;

    Equipped with a brand-new liquid cooling system, with a special coolant injected inside the body as a conductive medium, enhancing operational stability in high-load scenarios through an active cooling solution;

    The back of the device features a nano-level embossed star trail texture, and the camera module is completely flush.

item.title: Reactor 上线实时世界模型试玩入口
item.guid: Reactor-上线实时世界模型试玩入口
item.description:
Recently, Reactor officially launched an early preview portal for its "Real-time World Model," allowing users to directly experience interactive 3D scenes instantly generated by AI simply by opening a webpage. 近日，Reactor 正式上线旗下「实时世界模型」早期预览入口，用户打开网页即可直接体验由 AI 即时生成的可交互 3D 场景。

It is reported that the company was co-founded by former core members of Apple and Luma AI. The core of its technical roadmap is to deploy generative models on its self-built global low-latency cloud infrastructure, enabling real-time generation of pixels, sound effects, and interactive feedback. 据悉，该公司由前苹果与 Luma AI 核心成员联合创办，其技术路线的核心是将生成模型部署于自建的全球低延迟云基础设施之上，实现像素、音效与交互反馈的实时生成。

In a demo video released by co-founder and CTO Bryce Schmidtchen on the X platform, a red sports car drives through an alien desert. Scene elements such as bumpy roads and distant planets are all rendered in real-time by AI, and instantly respond to user control inputs. 联合创始人兼 CTO Bryce Schmidtchen 在 X 平台发布的演示视频中，一辆红色跑车在异星沙漠中行驶，路面颠簸、远处行星等场景元素均由 AI 实时渲染，并即时响应用户的操控输入。

item.title: 火山引擎 Agent Plan 上线：Seed 系列模型与联网搜索打包订阅
item.guid: 火山引擎-Agent-Plan-上线：Seed-系列模型与联网搜索打包订阅
item.description:
Volcengine officially released Agent Plan yesterday, integrating multimodal model invocation and Harness tools into a unified subscription service, targeting AI agent scenarios. 火山引擎昨日正式发布 Agent Plan，将多模态模型调用与 Harness 工具整合为一体化订阅服务，面向 AI 智能体场景。

The package covers ByteDance's self-developed Seed series models such as Doubao-Seed, Doubao-Seedance, and Doubao-Seedream, as well as third-party large models like GLM-5.1 and Kimi-K2.6, and has built-in internet search and memory capabilities. 套餐涵盖字节跳动自研的 Doubao-Seed、Doubao-Seedance、Doubao-Seedream 等 Seed 系列模型，以及 GLM-5.1、Kimi-K2.6 等第三方大模型，并内置联网搜索与记忆能力。

Billing uses a unified AFP (Agent Fuel Value) unit. The package is divided into four tiers, compatible with mainstream platforms such as Claude Code and OpenClaw. During the public beta, a total of 5500 units are available for purchase daily, and the enterprise version is launched simultaneously. 计费采用统一的 AFP（Agent 燃料值）单位。套餐分四档，兼容 Claude Code、OpenClaw 等主流平台，公测期间每天总计限购 5500 个、企业版同步上线。

item.title: QClaw 上线「文件空间」打通腾讯文档与 ima
item.guid: QClaw-上线「文件空间」打通腾讯文档与-ima
item.description:
Tencent Cloud announced yesterday that QClaw officially launched the "File Space" feature. After a single authorization, users can directly access local files, Tencent Docs, and ima knowledge bases within QClaw, eliminating the need to manually transfer files between multiple applications. 腾讯云昨日宣布，QClaw 正式上线「文件空间」功能。完成一次授权后，用户可在 QClaw 内直接调用本地文件、腾讯文档及 ima 知识库，无需在多个应用间手动搬运文件。

For Tencent Docs, QClaw has achieved deep interoperability of underlying accounts and permissions. AI-generated content can be directly saved to the cloud and a collaboration link can be generated for team members to continue editing on the web. 腾讯文档方面，QClaw 实现了底层账号与权限的深度互通，AI 生成内容可直接保存至云端并生成协作链接，供团队成员在网页端继续编辑。

For ima knowledge bases, users can directly retrieve favorited content within QClaw for analysis, and QClaw-generated content also supports one-click saving back to ima, enabling bidirectional knowledge flow. ima 知识库方面，用户可在 QClaw 内直接调取收藏内容参与分析，QClaw 生成的内容也支持一键保存回 ima，实现知识的双向流转。

item.title: 霸王茶姬布局冰淇淋赛道，定价 18 至 26 元
item.guid: 霸王茶姬布局冰淇淋赛道，定价-18-至-26-元
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, BaWangChaJi recently launched an Italian ice cream product line at its flagship store on Wukang Road in Shanghai, introducing 10 Gelato flavors and 3 ice cream floats at once. Currently, it's only a trial operation at this store, requiring in-store ordering and not supporting mini-program orders. The products are divided into two series: Gelato and Gelato Tea: 据界面新闻报道，霸王茶姬近日在上海武康路旗舰店推出意式冰淇淋产品线，一次性上架 10 款 Gelato 及 3 款冰淇淋雪顶特饮，现阶段仅限该门店试营业，需到店点单，不支持小程序下单。产品分为 Gelato 和 Gelato 茶两个系列：

    The Gelato series has 10 flavors, represented by Boya Juexian (Jasmine Snow Bud Tea base), Yimo Shanyue (Matcha Tea base), Wanli Mulan (Oolong Tea base), and others;

    The Gelato Tea series offers 3 products in the "ice cream + tea base" format: Yunding · Yimo Shanyue, Yunding · Mangmang, and Yunding · Camelot, with prices ranging from 18 to 26 yuan.

item.title: 阿里官宣千问接入淘宝 40 亿商品库，对话即可下单
item.guid: 阿里官宣千问接入淘宝-40-亿商品库，对话即可下单
item.description:
Alibaba announced yesterday that Qianwen is fully integrated with Taobao, allowing users to select, compare, and order Taobao products by conversing within the Qianwen App; Taobao users can access related functions through the "Qianwen AI Shopping Assistant" entry in the bottom "Messages" bar. 阿里巴巴昨日宣布千问与淘宝全面打通，用户在千问 App 内对话即可完成淘宝商品挑选、对比与下单；淘宝用户则可通过底部「消息」栏的「千问 AI 购物助手」入口使用相关功能。

Qianwen has access to Taobao's 4 billion product database and over 20 years of shopping scenario data, currently offering four functions on the Taobao side: 千问接入淘宝 40 亿商品库及超 20 年购物场景数据，目前在淘宝端提供四项功能：

    AI Q&A: Precisely recommends products, supports parameter comparison, and one-sentence ordering, assisted grabbing, and returns/exchanges;

    AI Try-on: Freely matches tops and bottoms, provides styling suggestions;

    AI Product Discovery: Send images, videos, or links to quickly find similar products;

    AI Money-saving: Summarizes discount information, generates coupon collection and bundling plans with one click.

Meanwhile, Alipay officially released its new "AI Pay" capability, providing payment support for conversational shopping processes. In the "AI Low-Price Snatching" feature, after a user gives instructions to the Qianwen AI Shopping Assistant, Alipay's "AI Pay" generates a one-time delegated authorization for the purchase task. After identity verification, the AI will automatically monitor for the target price and complete the order. 与此同时，支付宝正式发布「AI 付」新能力，为对话购物流程提供支付支撑。在「AI 低价帮抢」功能中，用户向千问 AI 购物助手下达指令后，支付宝「AI 付」会针对该购买任务生成一次性委托授权，完成核身验证后，AI 将自动蹲守目标价格并完成下单。

The entire process follows a "one instruction, one authorization, invalid after use" mechanism, currently supporting purchases of goods under 1000 yuan. 整个流程遵循「一次指令、一次授权、用完失效」的机制，目前支持 1000 元以内商品的购买。

item.title: 微信支付推出 AI 接入 Skill
item.guid: 微信支付推出-AI-接入-Skill
item.description:
WeChat's official account "WeChat Open Class" yesterday released an announcement, disclosing multiple WeChat feature updates for April, covering payments, mini-programs, WeChat Work, mini-games, mini-stores, and stickers, among others. 微信官方账号「微信公开课」昨日发布公告，披露微信 4 月多项功能更新，涵盖支付、小程序、企业微信、小游戏、小店及贴图等。

    AI-oriented payment access toolkit: includes three tools: Skill packs, AI-friendly documentation, and AI-friendly APIs, supporting over twenty functions such as split payments, APP payments, H5 payments, mini-program payments, combined payments, and order refunds;

    Mini-game IAP incentive program upgrade: In the basic phase, incentives are distributed at 10% of monthly revenue; if unlocked through advertising, 50% of the ad spend can be obtained as an incentive each time; new games launched for the first time also enjoy a "first 50 million yuan no revenue share" policy, and can receive up to 20 million yuan in incentives.

    WeChat Mini-Store has launched six benefits for new merchants, including 0 deposit for trial operation, a reduction in the technical service fee rate for self-operated transaction volume to 1%, as well as traffic incentives, free trials of operational tools, and more.

item.title: 《诺曼底 72 小时》定档 6 月 6 日
item.guid: 《诺曼底-72-小时》定档-6-月-6-日
item.description:
The new WWII-themed film "Normandy 72 Hours" has been confirmed for import and is scheduled to be released on June 6th. 二战题材新片《诺曼底 72 小时》已确认引进，定于 6 月 6 日上映。

The film focuses on the critical 72 hours leading up to the Normandy landings, centering on Captain James Stagg, chief meteorologist for the Allied Expeditionary Force Supreme Headquarters, and recounts the true historical event of him providing weather assessments to Supreme Commander Eisenhower, influencing the course of the battle. 影片聚焦诺曼底登陆前夕的关键 72 小时，以盟军远征军最高司令部首席气象学家詹姆斯 · 斯塔格上尉为核心人物，讲述其向最高指挥官艾森豪威尔提供天气研判、影响战局走向的真实历史事件。

item.title: 恐怖片《寂静之地 3》正式宣布开拍
item.guid: 恐怖片《寂静之地-3》正式宣布开拍
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," the horror film "A Quiet Place 3" has officially announced the start of filming. The film continues to be set in a monster-infested world, maintaining the series' core "don't speak" premise. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，恐怖片《寂静之地 3》已正式宣布开拍。影片继续设定在怪物侵袭的世界里，延续系列「不要说话」的核心设定。

John Krasinski continues to serve as director and screenwriter for this film, which is scheduled for North American release on July 30, 2027. 本片由约翰 · 卡拉辛斯基继续担任导演及编剧，影片定档 2027 年 7 月 30 日北美上映。
